_metadata.name: Web/API Fuzz Triage
_metadata.description: Authorized bug bounty workflow that runs bounded ffuf path and API route discovery, ranks actionable responses, and writes a focused triage report.
_metadata.author: sentris-team

manifest.name: Web/API Fuzz Triage
manifest.description: Discover hidden web and API paths from an authorized target URL using a bounded ffuf wordlist and prioritized triage report.
manifest.author: sentris-team

graph.name: Web/API Fuzz Triage
graph.description: Bounded ffuf discovery workflow for authorized bug bounty web and API targets.

runtimeInputs.label: Target URL
runtimeInputs.description: Authorized base URL or explicit FUZZ URL, for example https://example.com or https://example.com/FUZZ.

runtimeInputs.label: Wordlist
runtimeInputs.description: Small in-scope path or API route wordlist such as api/health, swagger.json, graphql, admin.

runtimeInputs.label: Scan intensity
runtimeInputs.description: Use safe, normal, or thorough. Safe caps the wordlist for live triage.

runtimeInputs.label: Authorization notes
runtimeInputs.description: Program scope, exclusions, rate limits, and validation notes to include in the report.
